creator: joe@pavilion.net
text:
I've added file flags support (mostly from NetBSD) to mtree in -current.
I'll leave this -PR open for a while, until (a) I've merged it back to
-stable, and (b) we've decided what we're going to do with respect to default
flags values in the system mtree layout.

Joe
-- 
Josef Karthauser	FreeBSD: How many times have you booted today?
Technical Manager	Viagra for your server (http://www.uk.freebsd.org)
Pavilion Internet plc.  [joe@pavilion.net, joe@uk.freebsd.org, joe@tao.org.uk]
